operations.summary: List all available records from change audit table

parameters.name: show_changes
parameters.description: Display the values before and after the change

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Display the records from after the specified date

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: Display the records from before the specified date

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Display the records of the changed entities belonging to the specified type
parameters.allowableValues: party, workflow, role, ldap_configuration, radius_settings, calendar

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Display the records of the changed entities with the specified name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Display the records of the changed entities with the specified ID

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Display the records of the changes that were done by an admin with the specified user name

domain.description: the name of the source domain

sub_policy_rule.description: The rules related to the subpolicy
